<p style="text-align: center;"><strong>Year : </strong>2026 &#124; <strong>Size :</strong> 30 MB</p>
<p>The Slaughterverse is heating up with the newest installment of the all-new series! Succession is imminent as Victor St. George and his emissaries arrive at the House of Slaughter. With Cecilia out in the field on a clean-up mission, will a play for power occur in her absence? And what exactly is Colin Slaughter up to back at the House? </p>
<p>The post <a href="https://getcomics.org/other-comics/fall-of-the-house-of-slaughter-2-2026/">Fall of the House of Slaughter #2 (2026)</a> appeared first on <a href="https://getcomics.org">GetComics</a></p>
